title: libertia recta
intro: Libertia recta, also known as the yellow flag, is a perennial plant species in the iris family that is native to the southern Andes in South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, as it contains iridoid glycosides and flavonoids that have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Libertia recta include reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Libertia recta can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
